examples: I know you think I'm incurably nosy, but the truth is I'm concerned about you.
I know you think I'm incurably nosey.
Take the incurably sick dog to the veterinarian and ask him to put it away.
The Bush administration has reviewed this 200-page draft and concluded that it is incurably flawed.
Described as a "free destination for the incurably curious" it has hosted exhibitions on topics as diverse as death, sleep, dirt and miracles.
